✦ For Retailers & Distributors

Why Partner with Nivya?

We work directly with retailers, boutiques, and distributors. Get the best rates with no middlemen.

📦
Bulk Orders Welcome
Starting from 50 pieces per design. Mix & match styles, colours, and sizes with flexible minimum order quantities.
🎨
Custom Orders
Need your own label or a unique design? We offer custom printing, embroidery, and branding services for large orders.
🚚
Fast Pan-India Delivery
Reliable shipping across all states. Bulk orders dispatched within 3–5 business days. Express options available.
💎
Premium Quality
All fabrics are tested and washed. Consistent stitching quality for every piece — returns are rare.
🏷️
Competitive Pricing
Direct-from-manufacturer rates. Volume discounts apply on orders above 100 pieces. Price list shared on request.
🤝
Trusted by 200+ Retailers
Longstanding partnerships with shops across Maharashtra, Gujarat, Karnataka, and more. Trusted since 2012.
Get Wholesale Price List ✓ No registration needed  ·  ✓ Reply within 2 hours
✦ Our Story

Crafting Rest,
Since 2012

Based in Maharashtra, Nivya Nighties, a brand of Amber Traders, started as a small family-run business with a simple belief — every woman deserves comfortable and beautiful sleepwear. Over the years, we have grown into a trusted wholesale supplier, delivering premium nightwear to retailers across India with a focus on quality, consistency, and long-term partnerships.

  • In-house design team creating 50+ new styles each season
  • Fabrics sourced from certified mills in Surat and Tirupur
  • Quality-checked production line with consistent sizing
  • Eco-friendly packaging for all bulk shipments
  • Dedicated account manager for every wholesale partner
